title: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - 211info
text: EUGENE MAIN OFFICE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides recovery services for alcohol and substance abuse, gambling, and other addictions. Early intervention classes for youth who have received minor-in-possession are also available. Treatment by phone or telehealth. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Recovery Center Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Other services by appointment only Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-2667 Office Main phone (541) 729-4417 Recovery Services Hotline (800) 472-2595 Recovery Center Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: OHP accepted, sliding scale fee, low or no cost DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On 5th Avenue between Adams Street and Blair Boulevard. Lane Transit District (LTD) bus stop one block from location. Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention * Hispanic/Latino Community Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention * Immigrants Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Hispanic/Latino Community Assessment for Substance Use Disorders * Immigrants Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Hispanic/Latino Community Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Immigrants Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention * Hispanic/Latino Community Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention * Immigrants DUI Offender Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community DUI Offender Programs * Immigrants Mental Health Crisis Lines * Hispanic/Latino Community Mental Health Crisis Lines * Immigrants Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community Substance Use Disorder Counseling * Immigrants Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH CARE FOOD - MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE FOOD - ORGANIC GARDEN PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - OHP HEALTH-RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HUMAN SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE MAIN OFFICE
